capabilities.name: AI Agent Configuration
capabilities.description: Create and tune ai.agent records including system prompt, welcome message, model selection, allowed tools, visibility, and handoff rules.
examples: Create a support agent that answers FAQs and escalates to humans
Configure an agent with a custom system prompt and restricted tool set
Set agent visibility so only specific channel members can invoke it

capabilities.name: LLM Provider Integration
capabilities.description: Configure ai.provider records for cloud and local LLM endpoints, manage encrypted credentials, base URLs, timeouts, and retry policies.
examples: Add an OpenAI GPT-4o provider with encrypted API key
Configure an Ollama provider pointing to a local server
Set up Azure OpenAI with deployment name and endpoint

capabilities.name: AI Model Registry
capabilities.description: Maintain ai.model records with model identifiers, context windows, pricing, provider links, and supported modalities.
examples: Register gpt-4o and claude-3-5-sonnet models with context windows
Update per-token pricing for a new model release
Map a model to multiple providers for fallback

capabilities.name: Tool Binding & Execution
capabilities.description: Register ai.tool records, define JSON schemas, bind tools to agents, and implement the tool execution loop with proper error handling.
examples: Create a custom tool that searches CRM leads
Restrict an agent to only three allowed tools
Handle tool execution errors gracefully in the agent loop

capabilities.name: Prompt Engineering
capabilities.description: Build ai.prompt records using o_editor_prompt HTML fields, variables, variants, and versioning for reusable templates.
examples: Create a prompt template for product description generation
Use prompt variables to inject record fields at runtime
Version a prompt and A/B test variants

capabilities.name: Session & Memory Management
capabilities.description: Manage ai.agent.session and ai_message records, persist history, summarize long threads, and enforce session expiry.
examples: Link an AI session to a Discuss channel
Summarize a long conversation before context limit
Archive expired sessions via cron

capabilities.name: AI Security & Governance
capabilities.description: Apply security groups and record rules for AI agents, provider credentials, usage limits, and administration.
examples: Grant AI manager group full CRUD on ai.agent
Restrict provider API keys to a credential manager group
Set record rules so users see only their own sessions

capabilities.name: Agent Deployment
capabilities.description: Deploy agents to Discuss channels, mail activities, and project tasks with auto-responder and human handoff configuration.
examples: Assign an agent to a WhatsApp Discuss channel
Configure an agent to create activities on records
Trigger human takeover after three misunderstood messages

capabilities.name: Usage Monitoring & Limits
capabilities.description: Track token usage, requests, and cost per agent/provider/user. Configure quotas and alerting.
examples: View monthly token consumption per provider
Set a daily request limit per user
Create a cron that emails usage reports
